name: pgs-engine
description: Partitioned Graph Synthesis — coverage-optimized query architecture for large knowledge graphs. Finds what standard RAG misses, reports what's absent, and discovers cross-domain connections.

scripts.test:unit: mocha test/louvain.test.js test/partitioner.test.js test/router.test.js test/sweeper.test.js test/synthesizer.test.js test/session.test.js --timeout 10000
